entitySuffixRule: Must contain the phrase "limited liability company" or "limited company," or an abbreviation of one of those phrases (e.g., "LLC," "L.L.C.," "LC," "L.C.").
distinguishabilityNote: Must be distinguishable in the records of the Texas Secretary of State from the name of any existing filing entity, a registered foreign filing entity or its fictitious name, a reserved or registered name, and any registered series of a Texas LLC.
notes: "Lotto" and "lottery" are prohibited outright (§ 5.061). Veteran-related terms (veteran, legion, foreign, Spanish, disabled, war, world war) require written approval from a congressionally recognized veterans organization (§ 5.062). Names falsely implying affiliation with a governmental entity are prohibited (§ 5.064). Reservations (Form 501, $40; § 4.151(2)) last 120 days and may be renewed for successive 120-day periods during the 30 days before expiry (§§ 5.104–5.105).
